requirement_topic.en: EU Authorised Representative, Swedish-Language Labelling, and WEEE Registration (El-kretsen)
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟授权代表、瑞典语标签及WEEE注册（El-kretsen）
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟授權代表、瑞典語標籤及WEEE登記（El-kretsen）

summary.en: Foreign (non-EU) manufacturers placing wireless devices on the Swedish market must appoint an EU Authorised Representative (EU AR) established within the EU — unless an EU-based importer assumes full legal responsibility under RED Art. 16. The EU AR is the named legal contact for market surveillance authorities including PTS, Konsumentverket, and ELSÄK, and must be identified on the product or its packaging together with the importer's name and address. Swedish consumer product regulations require consumer-facing labelling to be in the Swedish language, including safety warnings, operating instructions, and product information required under relevant EU legislation. Failure to provide Swedish-language labelling is a basis for Konsumentverket enforcement action. Additionally, Sweden maintains its own separate WEEE (Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment) producer registry. In Sweden, WEEE obligations are administered under the Förordning (2014:1075) om producentansvar för elutrustning (Regulation on producer responsibility for electrical equipment), with El-kretsen (Stiftelsen El-Kretsen) being the principal approved producer responsibility organisation (PRO) for EEE producer registration and take-back compliance. Producers or their EU AR must register with Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency) via a PRO such as El-kretsen before placing EEE on the Swedish market. Registration in another EU member state's WEEE system does not fulfil the Swedish producer registration obligation.
summary.zh: 向瑞典市场投放无线设备的境外（非欧盟）制造商，须在欧盟境内委任欧盟授权代表（EU AR）——除非欧盟进口商依据RED第16条承担完整法律责任。EU AR是面向市场监管机构（包括PTS、Konsumentverket和ELSÄK）的法定联系人，其姓名须与进口商名称及地址一并标注于产品或包装上。瑞典消费品法规要求面向消费者的标签须使用瑞典语，包括安全警告、操作说明及相关欧盟立法要求的产品信息。未提供瑞典语标签是Konsumentverket采取执法行动的依据。此外，瑞典设有独立的WEEE（废弃电气电子设备）生产商注册体系。在瑞典，WEEE义务依据《电气设备生产商责任条例》（Förordning 2014:1075）执行，El-kretsen（El-Kretsen基金会）是主要的电气电子设备生产商注册和回收合规的核准生产商责任组织（PRO）。生产商或其EU AR须在向瑞典市场投放电气电子设备前，通过El-kretsen等PRO在瑞典环境保护局（Naturvårdsverket）完成注册。在其他欧盟成员国WEEE体系中的注册不满足瑞典生产商注册义务。
summary.zht: 向瑞典市場投放無線設備的境外（非歐盟）製造商，須在歐盟境內委任歐盟授權代表（EU AR）——除非歐盟進口商依據RED第16條承擔完整法律責任。EU AR是面向市場監管機構（包括PTS、Konsumentverket和ELSÄK）的法定聯繫人，其姓名須與進口商名稱及地址一並標注於產品或包裝上。瑞典消費品法規要求面向消費者的標籤須使用瑞典語，包括安全警告、操作說明及相關歐盟立法要求的產品信息。未提供瑞典語標籤是Konsumentverket採取執法行動的依據。此外，瑞典設有獨立的WEEE（廢棄電氣電子設備）生產商登記體系。在瑞典，WEEE義務依據《電氣設備生產商責任條例》（Förordning 2014:1075）執行，El-kretsen（El-Kretsen基金會）是主要的電氣電子設備生產商登記和回收合規的核准生產商責任組織（PRO）。生產商或其EU AR須在向瑞典市場投放電氣電子設備前，通過El-kretsen等PRO在瑞典環境保護局（Naturvårdsverket）完成登記。在其他歐盟成員國WEEE體系中的登記不滿足瑞典生產商登記義務。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 16 — EU Authorised Representative obligations for non-EU manufacturers
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — market surveillance; importer and EU AR identification requirements on products
Förordning (2014:1075) om producentansvar för elutrustning — Swedish WEEE producer responsibility regulation
Directive 2012/19/EU (WEEE Directive) — EU-level framework transposed into Swedish law
El-kretsen (Stiftelsen El-Kretsen) — principal approved PRO for WEEE registration in Sweden
Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency) — WEEE producer registry authority
Konsumentverket (Swedish Consumer Agency) — enforcement of Swedish-language labelling requirements

summary.en: China does not require a domestic EU Authorised Representative or in-EU representative for exported products in the same legal sense. Chinese exporters deal directly with foreign customs authorities and trading partners. There is no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent to the EU Authorised Representative obligation under RED Art. 16, to Swedish-language labelling requirements, or to Sweden's WEEE producer registration system (El-kretsen / Naturvårdsverket). China's domestic WEEE system (废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例 — Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products) applies only within China and has no cross-border recognition.
summary.zh: 中国对出口产品不要求在欧盟境内设置相同法律意义上的欧盟授权代表或在欧代表。中国出口商通过贸易伙伴直接与外国海关机构打交道。针对RED第16条下的欧盟授权代表义务、瑞典语标签要求及瑞典WEEE生产商注册体系（El-kretsen/Naturvårdsverket），中国无直接监管等效项。中国国内WEEE体系（《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》）仅适用于中国境内，不具有跨境认可效力。
summary.zht: 中國對出口產品不要求在歐盟境內設置相同法律意義上的歐盟授權代表或在歐代表。中國出口商通過貿易夥伴直接與外國海關機構打交道。針對RED第16條下的歐盟授權代表義務、瑞典語標籤要求及瑞典WEEE生產商登記體系（El-kretsen/Naturvårdsverket），中國無直接監管等效項。中國國內WEEE體系（《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》）僅適用於中國境內，不具有跨境認可效力。

standards_or_laws: No direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for EU Authorised Representative, Swedish-language labelling, or Swedish WEEE registration obligations
废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例 (Regulation on Recovery and Disposal of Waste EEE, China) — China-domestic only; not recognised in Sweden

gap.en: Three distinct obligations with no Chinese regulatory equivalent: (1) EU Authorised Representative — a named EU-established entity must be appointed and identified on product/packaging before first shipment to Sweden; this person/entity is legally accountable to PTS, Konsumentverket, and ELSÄK; (2) Swedish-language labelling — consumer product instructions, safety warnings, and mandatory product information must be in Swedish; sourcing Chinese-manufactured products with labelling only in Chinese or English does not satisfy this requirement; (3) WEEE registration in Sweden — producers or their EU AR must register with Naturvårdsverket via El-kretsen (or another approved Swedish PRO) before placing EEE on the Swedish market; compliance in another EU member state's WEEE system is not transferable to Sweden. Failure on any of these three obligations exposes products to Konsumentverket or PTS enforcement action, customs hold, or compulsory withdrawal.
gap.zh: 三项无中国监管等效项的独立义务：（1）欧盟授权代表——须在首次向瑞典发货前委任并在产品/包装上标明欧盟境内设立的实体；该人/实体须对PTS、Konsumentverket和ELSÄK承担法律责任；（2）瑞典语标签——消费品说明书、安全警告及强制产品信息须使用瑞典语；仅提供中文或英文标签的中国制造产品不满足该要求；（3）瑞典WEEE注册——生产商或其EU AR须在向瑞典市场投放电气电子设备前，通过El-kretsen（或其他经批准的瑞典PRO）在Naturvårdsverket完成注册；在其他欧盟成员国WEEE体系中的合规不可转移至瑞典。上述三项义务中任一不合规均可导致产品受到Konsumentverket或PTS执法行动、海关扣押或强制撤回。
gap.zht: 三項無中國監管等效項的獨立義務：（1）歐盟授權代表——須在首次向瑞典發貨前委任並在產品/包裝上標明歐盟境內設立的實體；該人/實體須對PTS、Konsumentverket和ELSÄK承擔法律責任；（2）瑞典語標籤——消費品說明書、安全警告及強制產品信息須使用瑞典語；僅提供中文或英文標籤的中國製造產品不滿足該要求；（3）瑞典WEEE登記——生產商或其EU AR須在向瑞典市場投放電氣電子設備前，通過El-kretsen（或其他經批准的瑞典PRO）在Naturvårdsverket完成登記；在其他歐盟成員國WEEE體系中的合規不可轉移至瑞典。上述三項義務中任一不合規均可導致產品受到Konsumentverket或PTS執法行動、海關扣押或強制撤回。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EU AR under RED Art. 16; Swedish-language labelling under Konsumentverket requirements; WEEE registration via El-kretsen / Naturvårdsverket under Förordning (2014:1075)
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no Chinese regulatory equivalent to EU AR, Swedish-language labelling, or Swedish WEEE registration

source.publisher: El-kretsen (Stiftelsen El-Kretsen) — Swedish WEEE producer responsibility organisation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Three market-access obligations with no Chinese regulatory equivalent apply to wireless/IoT devices entering Sweden: (1) EU Authorised Representative (RED Art. 16) — mandatory before first shipment; (2) Swedish-language labelling for consumer products — enforced by Konsumentverket; (3) WEEE producer registration in Sweden via El-kretsen before market placement — WEEE registration in other EU states does not satisfy this. Non-compliance on any of these three exposes importers and distributors to PTS or Konsumentverket enforcement action.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入瑞典的无线/物联网设备须满足三项无中国监管等效项的市场准入义务：（1）欧盟授权代表（RED第16条）——首次发货前强制要求；（2）消费品瑞典语标签——由Konsumentverket执行；（3）市场投放前通过El-kretsen在瑞典完成WEEE生产商注册——其他欧盟国家的WEEE注册不满足该要求。上述三项义务中任一不合规均使进口商和经销商面临PTS或Konsumentverket的执法行动风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入瑞典的無線/物聯網設備須滿足三項無中國監管等效項的市場准入義務：（1）歐盟授權代表（RED第16條）——首次發貨前強制要求；（2）消費品瑞典語標籤——由Konsumentverket執行；（3）市場投放前通過El-kretsen在瑞典完成WEEE生產商登記——其他歐盟國家的WEEE登記不滿足該要求。上述三項義務中任一不合規均使進口商和經銷商面臨PTS或Konsumentverket的執法行動風險。
